body.body: cortex.py: replace SELECT * with _MEM_COLS_NO_EMBED in boot-time memory_type scans for EPISODIC (332ms, 4854 rows) and FACTUAL (63ms, 2746 rows). Same fix pattern as T-cortex-258. Add LIMIT where full scan not needed. MEDIUM inertia — read before editing. See #259.
body.title: Fix boot-time SELECT * on EPISODIC/FACTUAL type scans (#259)
body.result: cortex.py get_by_type(): SELECT * → SELECT {_MEM_COLS_NO_EMBED} (eliminates embedding blob load on every EPISODIC/FACTUAL type scan). consolidation.py: same SELECT * fix + corrected ORDER BY created_at → timestamp (created_at column doesn't exist). Both syntax OK.
